items.title: [正面] Impression on the first few hours: Surprisingly go...
items.summary:
Impression on the first few hours: Surprisingly good. Unique artstyle, good story, and while the deckbuilding aspect is not that deep, the moment-to-moment play is surprisingly engaging. I've used the words "surprise" a lot, but it's the word that best captures how I feel about this game. It feels like someone's passion project that had to be made as a gatcha game to sell. So far have not bought anything nor needed to. I may in fact spend some money later just to support the dev. Which is the best case scenario with these types of games.

EDIT - Wrote this review when I had 10~ hours or so. Now I have ten times as much I have more to say.

The game is engaging, obviously. There's also a LOT of game to keep you busy. There's story campaign that has normal difficutly as well as hard and Insane (which I have yet to unlock 100 hours in) but there's also optional PvP, Daily random dungeons, Another challenge with multiple dungeons that reuqires multiple characters to complete and...

It's a lot of stuff. I am taking my time and slowly exploring the content, not blazing through anything. Not only there are a lot of activities, but the character progression is somewhat byzantine, with 5 or 6 different currencies and at least 10 resources that improve characters not counting covenants. I'm sure someone out there has a spreadsheet of the optimal team and what is the best way to get it. But I prefer to figure things out on my own.

My experience is loging in daily to do a dungeon or two when I have time through the day and slowly progressing the story. First impression still stands: limited deckbuilding but great moment-to-moment play. The fun is using your cards and exalts (special abilities that take time to charge) as well as random relics to combo off each other and create insane turns that change how a fight is going. 

After a relatively strong start the story becomes more inconsistent as it goes. Currently on Chapter 7 of Season 1 (I have heard there is a second season after the first). The first two chapters are the best by far, but it never gets truly bad thankfully, just inconsistent with great, inspired moments mixing freely with cliches or muddled plot. I don't know if anyone plays gacha games for the story, but I do think missing out on Morimens' story is a shame, for despite its flaws it is still quite good.

Finally a note on difficulty. Some bosses or bonus dungeons can be quite brutal, especially if you challenge them while below the optimal level. But there is an emergency currency you can use to revive at full health when defeated, and this currency regenerates daily to a max of 5. I've never used more than 2 in a fight, and in story mode never went beyond using 1, making progression quite smooth. But apparently the game used to be harder and was then changed to make it easier, which caused some controversy with older players? Regardless, from my point of view the game is usually engaging and occasionaly challenging but I have yet to find myself "stuck" in the main story. My progress is slow because I get easily distracted with different activities, not because of any difficutly, at least so far.

I did eventually spend some money on the game, which I also wasted somewhat foolishly. Gained a skin and some special resources but not much else. I do not think Morimens is the kind of game where spending 10 bucks will put you much ahead of F2P players. Thankfully the game is generous, so you can still progress even in F2P, but thought I should warn anyone with extra cash in their pockets: make sure to spend it wisely and be prepared to either spend a lot or to not get much out of it. Honestly I did it mostly to support the game. Considering I got 100+ hours of entertainment, it's only fair.

items.title: [正面] Reverse: 1999 if it was eldritch themed. the artwo...
items.summary:
Reverse: 1999 if it was eldritch themed. the artwork and music are beautiful. the gacha aspect is very generous. 

the only gripe i have is the constant barrage of in-game purchases.

items.title: [负面] このゲーム日本語対応になってますけど最初の同意確認がまず中国語？で英語ですらなくゲーム内でもらえる運...
items.summary:
このゲーム日本語対応になってますけど最初の同意確認がまず中国語？で英語ですらなくゲーム内でもらえる運営からのメールなんかも一部日本語じゃなくて中国語になっててまともに遊べません
あと雰囲気はいいんですが全体的に重くてもっさりしてるのはこれ自分の環境が悪いのだろうか・・・

items.title:
[负面] Крайне негативное впечатление от игры. 
При необыч...
items.summary:
Крайне негативное впечатление от игры. 
При необычной механике фактически нет адекватного обучения. Нет доступного словаря того что разработчик имел в виду выливая на игрока лор игры вперемешку с основами боя. Слишком длинные диалоги, которые отнимают большую часть игрового времени. Ни где не нашел как уменьшить шрифт букв диалогов. Во время ходов описание карт съезжает ниже экрана, а попытка прочитать приводит к непреднамеренному ходу. 
Явно сырая и недоработанная игра. Удалить и забыть
